mapper.select: SELECT UCM_CODE, UCM_UCP_CODE, UCM_TITLE, UCM_WRITER, UCM_PUBLISHER, UCM_COVER_URL, UCM_FILE_TYPE FROM TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER WHERE UCM_CODE = #{ucmCode} AND UCM_WEBDRM2_YN = 'Y'

{ call sp_GetLicense( #{I_UCM_CODE, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{I_UIS_CODE, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{I_UM_CODE, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{I_UMD_CODE, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{I_ORDER_TYPE, mode=IN, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{O_ORDER_CODE, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR, javaType=java.lang.String}, #{O_PRODUCT_CODE, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR, javaType=java.lang.String}, #{O_STARTDATE, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR, javaType=java.lang.String}, #{O_ENDDATE, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR, javaType=java.lang.String}, #{O_DRMTYPE, mode=OUT, jdbcType=CHAR, javaType=java.lang.String}, #{RESULT, mode=OUT, jdbcType=INTEGER, javaType=java.lang.Integer}) }
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY ( UML_CODE, UML_UM_CODE, UML_NAME ) VALUES ( CONCAT('UML',LPAD(#{umlCode},10,'0')), #{umCode}, '내서재' )

INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK ( UME_CODE, UME_UML_CODE, UME_UM_CODE, UME_UCM_CODE, UME_ISDOWNLOAD, UME_INPUT_DATE ) VALUES ( CONCAT('UME',substring(#{ucmCode}, 4, 13),substring(#{umCode}, 3, 13), LPAD(#{umeCode},19,'0')), CONCAT('UML',LPAD(#{umlCode},10,'0')), #{umCode}, #{ucmCode}, 'Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK ( UME_CODE, UME_UML_CODE, UME_UM_CODE, UME_UCM_CODE, UME_ISDOWNLOAD, UME_INPUT_DATE ) VALUES ( CONCAT('UME', substring(#{ucmCode}, 4, 13), substring(#{umCode}, 3, 13), LPAD(#{umeCode},19,'0')), #{umeUmlCode}, #{umCode}, #{ucmCode}, 'Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK SET UME_ISDOWNLOAD = 'Y', UME_MOD_DATE = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, UME_INPUT_DATE = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE UME_UM_CODE = #{umCode} AND UME_UCM_CODE = #{ucmCode}
mapper.select: SELECT UML_CODE FROM TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY WHERE UML_UM_CODE = #{umCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK SET UME_STATUS = #{umeStatus}, UME_MOD_DATE = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
, UME_ISDOWNLOAD = 'Y'
, UME_INPUT_DATE = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE UME_CODE = #{umeCode} AND UME_UCM_CODE = #{ucmCode}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(UME_CODE) FROM TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK WHERE UME_UM_CODE = #{umCode} AND UME_UCM_CODE NOT IN (#{ucmCode}) AND UME_STATUS = 'A' AND DATE(UME_INPUT_DATE) = DATE(NOW())
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK_HISTORY ( UMEH_CODE, UMEH_UML_CODE, UMEH_UM_CODE, UMEH_UCM_CODE, UMEH_UDR_CODE, UMEH_SEQ, UMEH_LAST_READ_PERCENT, UMEH_LAST_READ_IDX, UMEH_LAST_READ_POSITION, UMEH_WEB_LAST_READ_PERCENT, UMEH_WEB_LAST_READ_IDX, UMEH_WEB_LAST_READ_POSITION, UMEH_LAST_READ_DATE, UMEH_FINISHREAD_COUNT, UMEH_FINISHREAD_DATE, UMEH_READ_STATUS, UMEH_ISLOCK, UMEH_PASSWORD, UMEH_STATUS, UMEH_ISDOWNLOAD, UMEH_DOWNLOAD_DATE, UMEH_RATE, UMEH_RATE_MEMO, UMEH_MOD_DATE, UMEH_INPUT_DATE, UMEH_REGDATE, UMEH_UMD_UID, UMEH_HISTORYDATE ) (SELECT *, NOW() FROM TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK WHERE UME_UM_CODE = #{umCode} AND UME_UCM_CODE = #{ucmCode})
